package.name: spacemouse_teleop
package.description: Cartesian jog bridge for the 3Dconnexion SpaceMouse. Integrates the spacenav velocity twist into a streaming PoseStamped target (captured from the live end-effector pose over TF), with dead-man gating and conservative speed limits. Robot-agnostic: the output drives any pose consumer (e.g. ikt_pose_commander or an FZI cartesian_motion_controller).
